name: Italian Busta Paga
description: Italian payslip. Detects Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Matricola INPS, IBAN, Italian dates and phone numbers, plus names, addresses. Disables the noisy 'Amounts' detector so salary figures aren't over-redacted.

patterns.name: Codice Fiscale
patterns.description: Italian tax code — 16 uppercase alphanumeric chars (case-sensitive)

patterns.name: Partita IVA
patterns.description: Italian VAT number — 11 digits, optional 'IT' prefix

patterns.name: IBAN
patterns.description: International Bank Account Number — supports spaces between groups

patterns.name: Italian date (DD/MM/YYYY or DD-MM-YYYY)
patterns.description: Italian date format — DD/MM/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY or DD-MM-YYYY

patterns.name: Italian phone number
patterns.description: Italian phone — fixed (0xx) or mobile (3xx), optional +39, bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers
